status.description: Required semantic status. Drives color via `data-cinder-status`. `success` maps to `--cinder-success`; `accent` maps to `--cinder-accent`.

connectionState.description: Realtime connection preset. Sets status, default label, and live-region semantics.

label.description: Optional human label. Rendered visibly when `showLabel` is true; used as the accessible name either way.

showLabel.description: Whether to render the visible label.

live.description: Use role="status" with polite live-region attributes. Defaults true when connectionState is provided.

class.description: Extra classes appended to the root element.
